UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile, including their identity, learning progression, and gamified statistics. This replaces `localStorage` user data.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity, corresponding to the Firebase Authentication User ID (UID).

username.description: The user-chosen username for display within the application.

email.description: The user's email address, primarily used for Firebase Authentication.

avatar.description: URL or local path to the user's selected avatar image.

activeTitleId.description: Reference to the ID of the Title entity currently selected and displayed by the user. (Relationship: Title 1:N UserProfile)

earnedBadgeIds.description: An array of IDs referencing Badge entities that the user has earned. (Relationship: Badge N:N UserProfile)

unlockedTitleIds.description: An array of IDs referencing Title entities that the user has unlocked. (Relationship: Title N:N UserProfile)

currentCocId.description: Reference to the ID of the CourseOfCompetency entity the user is currently working through. (Relationship: CourseOfCompetency 1:N UserProfile)

currentStepId.description: Reference to the ID of the Step entity the user is currently attempting within their current COC. (Relationship: Step 1:N UserProfile)

totalQuizAttempts.description: A list of objects, each tracking the total attempts for a specific quiz by its ID.

totalFullResets.description: The cumulative count of times the user has been reset to the first step of COC 1 due to progression rules (e.g., low quiz scores).

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user's profile was initially created.

role.description: The access role assigned to the user, such as 'user' or 'admin'.

AchievementLog.title: AchievementLog
AchievementLog.description: Records individual instances of badges or titles earned by a user, including when they were achieved and their significance.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AchievementLog entry.

userId.description: Reference to the ID of the UserProfile who earned this achievement. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N AchievementLog)

type.description: Specifies whether the achievement is a 'badge' or a 'title'.

entityId.description: Reference to the ID of the Badge or Title entity that was earned. (Relationship: Badge/Title 1:N AchievementLog)

entityName.description: The display name of the earned badge or title, for quick display without needing to lookup the entity.

earnedAt.description: Timestamp indicating the exact date and time the achievement was earned.

description.description: A contextual description of the achievement, e.g., 'Achieved Perfect Score on COC 1 Step 2 Quiz'.

isSpecialAchievement.description: Indicates if this recorded achievement is one of the special, highlightable achievements (e.g., 'Perfect Score', 'The Greatest Reset').

ChatMessage.title: ChatMessage
ChatMessage.description: Represents a single message within a chat session between two users.

chatId.description: Identifier for the chat session this message belongs to.

senderId.description: The UID of the user who sent the message.

message.description: The text content of the message.

timestamp.description: The server timestamp indicating when the message was sent.

Badge.title: Badge
Badge.description: Defines the characteristics of a collectible badge that users can earn within the game.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Badge entity.

name.description: The official name of the badge (e.g., 'Perfect Score').

description.description: A detailed explanation of how to earn the badge or what it represents.

iconUrl.description: URL or local path to the graphic icon representing the badge.

isSpecial.description: Indicates if this badge is a special or hidden achievement, often with unique unlock conditions (e.g., 'Creator' badge).

Title.title: Title
Title.description: Defines the characteristics of a title that users can unlock and display on their profile.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Title entity.

name.description: The official name of the title (e.g., 'The Greatest Reset', 'CREATOR').

description.description: A detailed explanation of the title and its prestige or meaning.

condition.description: The specific conditions or achievements required for a user to unlock this title.

isSpecial.description: Indicates if this title is a special or hidden achievement with unique unlock conditions.

FeedbackPost.title: FeedbackPost
FeedbackPost.description: Represents a feedback transmission on the board.

FeedbackReply.title: FeedbackReply
FeedbackReply.description: Represents a reply to a feedback transmission.
